items.title: The definition of “distillation” is interesting.
items.description: The definition of “distillation” is interesting. Going by this logic, the entirety of Cursor’s training data was distilled from Claude in the early days https://t.co/V08OTUG9QA
items.description_zh: “蒸馏”的定义很有趣。按照这个逻辑，Cursor 的全部训练数据都是早期从 Claude 那里提炼出来的 https://t.co/V08OTUG9QA

items.title: The biggest challenge for trad PMs trying to adapt to AI native building is a lack of mag…
items.title_zh: 对于试图适应人工智能原生构建的传统产品经理来说，最大的挑战是缺乏吸引力……
items.description: The biggest challenge for trad PMs trying to adapt to AI native building is a lack of magical thinking. A decade of frameworks, “agile” and metric obsession has led to constraint-first, incremental thinking. I used to combat this on my tea…
items.description_zh: 传统产品经理在尝试适应人工智能原生构建时面临的最大挑战是缺乏神奇的思维。十年来的框架、“敏捷”和对度量的痴迷导致了约束优先的增量思维。我曾经用茶来对抗这个……

items.title: And as we say in our blog, we're continuing to refine these safeguards to better distingu…
items.title_zh: 正如我们在博客中所说，我们正在继续完善这些保障措施，以更好地区分……
items.description: And as we say in our blog, we're continuing to refine these safeguards to better distinguish genuine misuse from legitimate requests and reduce false positives.
items.description_zh: 正如我们在博客中所说，我们将继续完善这些保护措施，以更好地区分真正的滥用与合法请求，并减少误报。

items.title: Have seen some questions about the updated classifiers and wanted to clarify.
items.title_zh: 看到了一些有关更新分类器的问题并想澄清一下。
items.description: Have seen some questions about the updated classifiers and wanted to clarify. As with the original classifiers, a small fraction of routine coding and debugging tasks will be flagged and fall back to Opus. We're excited for guys to get acc…
items.description_zh: 看到了一些有关更新分类器的问题并想澄清一下。与原始分类器一样，一小部分例行编码和调试任务将被标记并回落到 Opus。我们很高兴大家能够获得……

items.title: AI is expensive to run partly because most workloads today run on generic hardware design…
items.title_zh: 人工智能的运行成本高昂，部分原因是当今大多数工作负载都在通用硬件设计上运行……
items.description: AI is expensive to run partly because most workloads today run on generic hardware designed pre-LLMs. Etched is the first system designed from the ground up for modern inference. https://t.co/KluYZIZATE
items.description_zh: 人工智能的运行成本很高，部分原因是当今大多数工作负载都在LLM预科设计的通用硬件上运行。 Etched 是第一个专门为现代推理而设计的系统。 https://t.co/KluYZIZATE

items.title: At dinner, tech executive is relaying his company’s @vercel feedback, and then his 12-yea…
items.title_zh: 晚餐时，技术主管转达了公司的 @vercel 反馈，然后是他的 12 年……
items.description: At dinner, tech executive is relaying his company’s @vercel feedback, and then his 12-year-old son’s @vercel feedback 😁 Vercel is for everyone.
items.description_zh: 晚餐时，技术主管传达了他公司的 @vercel 反馈，然后是他 12 岁儿子的 @vercel 反馈 😁 Vercel 适合所有人。
